since_last: 42% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.93%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.54% · BTC -2.27% · Gold -1.52% · Nasdaq100 -0.27%. 42% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.93%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.93%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.28%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +10.46%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +10.46%, BIDU +5.27%, DELL +4.01%, AVGO +3.79%, ANET +3.60%. Laggards: PLTR -4.99%, NOW -4.52%, PANW -4.09%, UPST -4.04%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.39% at $151.55
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.39% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
